2605.25966.title: Mapping the Schedule x Bit-Width Boundary in Sub-100M Quantisation-Aware Training
2605.25966.paper_summary: We test whether the optimal learning-rate schedule depends on bit-width during from-initialisation quantisation-aware training (QAT) for sub-100M decoder language models. A 720-run factorial grid (Phase 2) over bit-width x warmdown fraction x LR magnitude x model size x seed (FP16/INT8/INT6, 15M-100M, 5 seeds) finds the optimal warmdown is 33% at every (bit-width, size) cell. The primary hypothesis -- that INT6 QAT requires a different schedule than higher-precision training -- is falsified at FP16/INT8/INT6. A 625-run follow-up (Phase 5) probes the null along five axes: optimiser (AdamW), schedule shape (cosine), training length (up to 9x more iterations), an extended size sweep (5M-350M), and an INT4 sweep from 3M to 100M. The null is robust under all three setup changes. The INT6 penalty follows a log-linear scaling law whose fit on Phase 2 predicts the five held-out Phase 5 sizes (5M, 8M, 175M, 250M, 350M) within their 95% prediction intervals (5/5). For INT4 the picture is sharper than the higher precisions: at 50M and 100M, wd33 is decisively optimal (paired z ~ 12-15, 10/10 seeds); below 50M, across the six tested sizes from 3M to 30M, no individual size shows a statistically significant schedule preference and the per-size mean penalty oscillates within seed-level noise. The boundary is therefore a transition between a noise-dominated regime below 50M and a decisive wd33 regime at and above 50M, not a clean wd10 region. A weight-to-grid-distance probe falsifies the simplest mechanism for the FP16/INT8/INT6 null result (rapid grid-snapping): pre-warmdown, INT6-QAT weights sit at essentially the same distance from the INT6 grid as FP16 weights (ratio ~ 1.04). Practical recommendation: at sub-100M scale, tune the LR schedule once at FP16 and apply unchanged to INT8/INT6 QAT; for INT4 at 50M+ use wd33; for INT4 below 50M the schedule choice is in the noise.
2605.25966.paper_summary_zh: 我們測試最佳學習率排程是否依賴於位寬，在從初始化量化感知訓練（QAT）中針對小於100M的解碼器語言模型進行。對於位寬 x 減少比例 x LR 大小 x 模型大小 x 隨機種子（FP16/INT8/INT6，15M-100M，5個隨機種子）的720次因子網格（第二階段）發現，最佳的減少比例在每個（位寬，大小）單元中均為33%。主要假設——INT6 QAT需要與高精度訓練不同的排程——在FP16/INT8/INT6中被證偽。625次後續實驗（第五階段）沿著五個軸探討虛無假設：優化器（AdamW）、排程形狀（餘弦）、訓練長度（最多增加9倍迭代）、擴展的大小掃描（5M-350M），以及從3M到100M的INT4掃描。虛無假設在所有三個設置變更下都是穩健的。INT6懲罰遵循一個對數線性縮放法則，其在第二階段的擬合預測了五個保留的第五階段大小（5M、8M、175M、250M、350M）在其95%的預測區間內（5/5）。對於INT4，情況比高精度更明確：在50M和100M時，wd33是明確的最佳選擇（配對z ~ 12-15，10/10隨機種子）；在50M以下，對於從3M到30M的六個測試大小，沒有任何單個大小顯示出統計上顯著的排程偏好，且每個大小的平均懲罰在隨機種子級別的噪聲中波動。因此，邊界是50M以下的噪聲主導區域與50M及以上的明確wd33區域之間的轉變，而不是一個乾淨的wd10區域。一個權重對網格距離的探測證偽了FP16/INT8/INT6虛無結果的最簡單機制（快速網格捕捉）：在預熱減少之前，INT6-QAT權重與INT6網格的距離實際上與FP16權重相同（比例約為1.04）。實際建議：在小於100M的規模下，先在FP16上調整LR排程，然後不變地應用於INT8/INT6 QAT；對於50M以上的INT4使用wd33；對於50M以下的INT4，排程選擇在噪聲中。
2605.25966.author: Christian Brandt Thomassen et.al.
